title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
###### **The rules, regulations, instructions, manuals and records, held by the Bank or under its control or used by its employees for discharging its functions**
A large number of documents like manuals, book of instructions, codified circulars, scheme of delegation of powers, proceedings of the Board etc and also periodical circulars are used by the employees for discharging various functions. The following documents are also relied upon:
